section.heading: Concurrent resolution essential to authorize investigations

content.p: After June 16, 1933, no new investigations shall be initiated by the Commission as the result of a legislative resolution, except the same be a concurrent resolution of the two Houses of Congress.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was not enacted as part of the Federal Trade Commission Act which comprises this subchapter.

note.heading: Transfer of Functions
note.p: For transfer of functions of Federal Trade Commission, with certain exceptions, to Chairman of such Commission, see Reorg. Plan No. 8 of 1950, § 1, eff. May 24, 1950, 15 F.R. 3175, 64 Stat. 1264, set out under section 41 of this title.
